{{Quote|And every decision is unanimous ... If one of us doesn't want to take an assignment, we pass on it. You'd get an equal vote, too, fly-guy. Just try to vote with me.|Tulah, Leadership School mercenary squad member, to Anakin Skywalker|<ref name="Jedi Quest: The School of Fear">''[[Jedi Quest: The School of Fear]]''</ref>}}
'''Tulah''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Muun/Legends|Muun]] who was a member of a squad of young [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] that trained at the elite [[Leadership School]] on [[Andara/Legends|Andara]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

Tall and skinny, with a shock of bright yellow hair that stuck straight up from his head, Tulah was in charge of formulating the group's strategies and battle plans. His voice and demeanor were described as "all business," and his own confession to being the squad's "comic relief" was simply a tongue-in-cheek expression that masked his serious purpose.
